fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Root, context-stack, memory-viewers, memory-api, and viewer-api repository READMEs are interconnected with clickable child README links where applicable. 2. Generated repository READMEs are sourced from rule-api targets where expected, and missing generator surfaces are introduced for the root/context-stack quick-fix path. 3. Repository READMEs explicitly highlight executable Rust binaries or installable content. 4. Commands referenced in those READMEs link to direct README or other documentation.
fields.title: [readmes] Smooth repository README surfaces

fields.title: [readmes] Smooth repository README surfaces

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. Root, context-stack, memory-viewers, memory-api, and viewer-api repository READMEs expose clickable child README or documentation links where applicable. 2. Generated repository READMEs are updated through their canonical .rule source files where generation already exists. 3. Repository READMEs explicitly call out executable binaries or installable content, or state that the repo root has no installable binary surface. 4. Commands referenced in those repository READMEs link to direct README or command documentation.
fields.implementation_summary: Refreshed the manual root and context-stack repository READMEs into navigable repo maps with explicit installable-content sections and command-doc links. Updated the canonical .rule source bodies for the generated memory-viewers, memory-api, and viewer-api repository READMEs so their regenerated outputs now link child docs and command owners directly.
fields.title: [readmes] Smooth repository README surfaces
fields.validation_summary: Validated by regenerating the memory-viewers, memory-api, and viewer-api README targets with rule sync-targets and then manually reading the edited root/context-stack README outputs.
